latin: Ego sum ille qui pulsat. non sum in periculo — ego sum periculum. vir aperit ianuam et occiditur, et tu putas me esse illum? non. ego sum ille qui pulsat!

questions.prompt: What does the speaker claim to be?
What happens to the man who opens the door?

translation: I am the one who knocks. I am not in danger — I am the danger. A man opens his door and is killed, and you think that I am him? No. I am the one who knocks!
